title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 475.525 - Exclusive and continuing jurisdiction
text:
475.525.  Exclusive and continuing jurisdiction. — Except as otherwise provided in section 475.524, a court that has appointed a guardian or issued a protective order consistent with sections 475.501 to 475.555 has exclusive and continuing jurisdiction over the proceeding until it is terminated by the court or the appointment or order expires by its own terms.
(L. 2011 H.B. 111 merged with S.B. 59 merged with S.B. 213)
